description.ko: 유기적 생물학과 디지털 건축이 공존하는 이론적 식물체인 FLORA-9의 예술적 표현입니다. 코드와 회로를 통해 흐르는 생명의 맥동을 시각화하여 자연과 인공 사이의 경계를 허뭅니다.
description.en: An artistic representation of FLORA-9, a theoretical botanical entity where organic biology and digital architecture coexist. It visualizes the pulse of life through code and circuitry, blending the boundaries between the natural and the artificial.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro shot of FLORA-9, a biomechanical organism exhibiting digital nature features. The flower has translucent, crystalline petals with integrated circuit patterns and glowing fiber-optic stamens. Bioluminescent blue pulses through its veins like data streams. The background is a dark, soft-focus digital nebula with floating code fragments and particles of light, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, intricate detail.
